name: mirofish
description: MiroFish - 간결하고 범용적인 집단지성 엔진, 무엇이든 예측

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n "engine,backend,frontend" -c "magenta,green,cyan" "npm run engine" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend"
scripts.backend: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=.. uv run python -m backend.run
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && GRAPHITI_ALLOW_LOCAL_EVAL=true PYTHONPATH=.. uv run python -m backend.run
